title: ZIP Extractor
description: Drag in a ZIP to browse its tree, download or preview text / images; all local, no upload
disclaimer: JSZip parses the archive locally in your browser — files never leave your machine.

drop.tip: Single-file preview & download supported; large archives may take a moment to parse

preview.hint: Select a file on the left to preview (auto-detects text / image)
preview.binary: Binary file ({{size}}) — please download to inspect
